LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITION TO VACATE ARBITRATION AWARD; P/A; DECLARATION OF ROBER M. UNGAR BOTH SIDES APPEARED. ARGUED AND THE COURT TOOK THIS MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. THE COURT SIGNED A TENTATIVE ORDER DENYING SAHARA AIRLINE'S PETITION TO VACATE AAA INTERNATIONAL ARBITRATION AWARD. UPON FINAL RULING OF THIS COURT, THE PREVAILING PARTY IS ORDERED TO PREPARE THE STATEMENT OF DECISION. HON. JAMES J. MCBRIDE. REPORTED BY ERIC THRONE. CSR 7855 (GPS)
TENTATIVE ORDER DENYING SAHARA AIRLINE'S PETITION TO VACATE AAA INTERNATIONAL ARBITRATION AWARD

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLM TRANSPORTATION EQUIPMENT CORPORATION PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED - GRANT PETITION TO CONFIRM AWARD. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. HON. RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. REPORTER: BELDON YEE, CSR #2647
LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. PETITIONER SAHARA INDIA AIRLINES, LTD.'S PETITION--TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 302. (DAG/301/EH) REPORTER: JOE VICKSTEIN, CSR 4780
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-11-2003 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER SAHARA INDIA AIRLINES, LTD. RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT PLM TRANSPORTATION EQUIPMENT CORPORATION $4,478,832.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,478,832.00, AND SAHARA SHALL PAY TO PLM INTEREST ON THE PRINCIPAL AT RATE OF $1,775.71 PER DAY AFTER 7/31/01 UNTIL SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT; SAHARA SHALL PAY TO PLM INTEREST ON THE PRINCIPAL $55,523.17 FOR PLM'S PORTION OF COMPENSATION FOR TRIBUNAL CHAIR PREVIOUSLY ADVANCED; SAHARA SHALL PAY TO PLM $10,680.05 FOR AAA ADMINISTRATIVE FEES AND EXPENSES PREVIOUSLY ADVANCED BY PLM; SAHARA SHALL PAY TO PLM ATTORNEY'S FEES IN THE SUM OF $527,315.00 PLUS COSTS IN THE SUM OF $151,304.00; SAHARA SHALL PAY TO PLM INTEREST
ORDER GRANTING PLM TRANSPORTATION EQUIPMENT CORPORATION'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
ISUANCE OF OUT OF COMMISSION TO THE STATE OF ILLINOIS,COUNTY OF COOK AS TO RONO DUTTA FILED BY RESPONDENT PLM TRANSPORTATION EQUIPMENT CORPORATION
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY DEFENDANT PLM TRANSPORTATION EQUIPMENT CORPORATION AS TO PLAINTIFF SAHARA INDIA AIRLINES, LTD.
NOTICE NOTICE OF ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT.

MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Robert M. Ungar, Esq. of O'LAVERTY & UNGAR 805/565-3402 for Petitioner SAHARA INDIA AIRLINES, LTD. petitioning to vacate arbitration award
Neil A. Goteiner, Esq. of FARELLA BRAUN & MARTEL LLP 954-4400 for Respondent PLM TRANSPORTATION EQUIPMENT CORPORATION

Argued and the Court took this matter under SUBMISSION. The Court signed a tentative order denying SAHARA AIRLINE's petition to vacate AAA INTERNATIONAL ARBITRATION AWARD. Upon final ruling of this Court, the prevailing party is ordered to prepare the Statement of Decision. (JJM/md) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
